transcript.text: Got it, thanks for letting me know. What can I help you with today?
This call is now being recorded.
I am looking for a co-working space.
Sure, I'd be happy to help with that. Are you looking for a specific location or any particular features?
Can you tell me what other services do you offer?
We offer coworking spaces, dedicated desks, and private office spaces. Is there a particular type you’re interested in, or do you need more details on any
And do you have private offices and dedicated desks?
Yes, we have both private offices and dedicated desks available. Do you have a team size in mind or just for yourself?
Thank you.
Got it, just for yourself then?
just for my kids.
Perfect! A dedicated desk might be a great fit. Are you looking for a short-term or long-term arrangement?
short term.
Got it, we do offer flexible short-term options as well. Would you like to book a tour or consultation to see the space?
Can you tell me what are the flexible plans?
We have flexible plans for both private offices and dedicated desks, depending on your needs. For exact details, a team member can provide you
Do you provide Wi-Fi in meetings?
Yes, we do provide high-speed Wi-Fi and access to meeting rooms as part of the service. Would you like more info on the meeting room availability?
Can I book a visit?
Absolutely! I'd be happy to help you arrange that. Could you please share your name and a preferred time for the visit?
My name is Tanisha and I will be available tomorrow 1 p.m.
Thanks, Tanisha! Could you also share your email so I can confirm the visit details for tomorrow at 1 PM?
So, yeah, Tanisha Jain, at the redgmail.com.
Great, I’ve booked your visit for tomorrow at 1 PM. You’ll get a confirmation email shortly. Anything else you’d like to check on before your visit?
Okay, thank you
You’re very welcome! Have a great day and see you tomorrow!
Thank you.
Take care!
Call recording has now ended.
